name: Generate Presales Report with Business Profile

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ input: JSON.stringify($json.intake || { prepared_for: { account_name: 'Example Corp' }, section_a_overview: { q06_workflow_name: 'Lead Processing' } }), structured: true, business_profile: { company_name: $json.company_name || 'Example Corp', company_url: $json.company_url || 'https://example.com', employee_count: $json.employee_count || 150, industry: $json.industry || 'technology', tech_stack: $json.tech_stack || ['Salesforce', 'HubSpot'], revenue_estimate: $json.revenue_estimate || '$5M-10M' } }) }}
